item.title: Dental AI — Intelligent Practice Management for Modern Dentistry
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Documentation Burden

Modern dentistry creates mountains of documentation:

  • Patient records — Medical history, treatment plans, progress notes
  • Clinical documentation — Procedure notes, findings, recommendations
  • Insurance — Claims, pre-authorizations, appeals
  • Compliance — HIPAA requirements, audit trails, consent forms
  • Communication — Patient education, follow-up instructions, referral letters

Dentists report spending 2-3 hours per day on documentation alone. That's time taken directly from patient care — or personal life.

How Dental AI Helps

Dental AI uses artificial intelligence to reduce documentation burden while improving quality:

Intelligent Documentation

  • Voice-to-notes — Dictate findings and let AI structure them into proper clinical documentation
  • Template automation — AI fills in routine sections based on context
  • Consistency checking — Catch missing information before it becomes a problem
  • Multi-format output — Same information formatted for charts, insurance, and patient communication

Patient Communication

  • Treatment explanations — Generate clear, patient-friendly descriptions of procedures
  • Follow-up instructions — Customized post-procedure care instructions
  • Appointment reminders — Intelligent scheduling communication

Practice Intelligence

  • Trend analysis — Spot patterns in patient data and practice metrics
  • Inventory forecasting — Predict supply needs based on scheduled procedures
  • Performance dashboards — Track KPIs that matter to practice health

Technical Architecture

Dental AI is built for reliability and security:

  • React 19 + Vite — Fast, responsive frontend
  • Express.js Backend — Robust API layer
  • OpenAI Integration — State-of-the-art language models for documentation
  • TypeScript — Type safety across the entire stack
  • HIPAA Considerations — Architecture designed with healthcare compliance in mind

Key Features

Smart Charting

Voice-enabled clinical note entry with AI assistance. Speak naturally, get properly structured documentation.

Document Generation

Generate referral letters, insurance narratives, and patient summaries from existing chart data.

Decision Support

AI-powered suggestions based on patient history and clinical best practices.

Integration Ready

Designed to work alongside existing practice management software, not replace it.

Who Is Dental AI For?

  • Solo practitioners — Get the documentation support of a larger practice
  • Group practices — Standardize documentation quality across providers
  • Dental specialists — Handle complex cases with appropriate documentation depth
  • Practice managers — Gain visibility into practice performance

Privacy and Security

Healthcare data demands the highest standards:

  • Data encryption in transit and at rest
  • Role-based access controls
  • Audit logging for compliance
  • Regular security assessments
  • HIPAA-compliant architecture design

Development Status

Dental AI is currently in active development. We're working closely with dental professionals to ensure the product meets real-world needs.

Learn More

Interested in bringing AI to your dental practice?

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Contact us for early access

Dental AI — Less paperwork. More patient care.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: Edu-ERP — Modern Resource Planning for Educational Institutions
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Administrative Challenge

Educational administration is uniquely complex:

  • Schedule conflicts — Rooms, instructors, and students must all align
  • Resource contention — Equipment, materials, and spaces are shared
  • Enrollment flux — Student counts change constantly
  • Compliance requirements — Reporting, accreditation, regulatory demands
  • Communication chaos — Students, parents, faculty, staff all need different information

Generic business software doesn't understand academic calendars, credit hours, or course prerequisites. Educational institutions deserve purpose-built tools.

Edu-ERP: Built for Education

Intelligent Scheduling

The calendar is the heart of any educational institution:

  • Conflict detection — Automatically identify scheduling conflicts before they happen
  • Room optimization — Match class sizes to appropriate spaces
  • Instructor availability — Respect teaching loads and preferences
  • Multi-view calendar — Day, week, month, and term views
  • Drag-and-drop rescheduling — Quick adjustments with automatic conflict checking

Resource Management

  • Facility booking — Labs, libraries, auditoriums, athletic facilities
  • Equipment tracking — Projectors, computers, specialized equipment
  • Material inventory — Textbooks, supplies, consumables
  • Maintenance scheduling — Keep facilities in working order

Student Information

  • Enrollment management — Applications, admissions, registration
  • Academic records — Grades, transcripts, certifications
  • Attendance tracking — Automated or manual attendance capture
  • Progress monitoring — Track student advancement toward goals

Faculty and Staff

  • Teaching assignments — Course loads, schedules, responsibilities
  • Workload balancing — Ensure fair distribution of duties
  • Professional development — Track certifications and training
  • Communication tools — Announcements, messaging, notifications

Technical Excellence

Edu-ERP is built on modern, reliable technology:

  • Next.js 16 — Fast, SEO-friendly, server-side rendering
  • React 19 — Latest React with concurrent features
  • Tailwind CSS — Clean, consistent design system
  • Radix UI — Accessible component library
  • Recharts — Beautiful, responsive data visualization
  • Framer Motion — Smooth animations for better UX
  • React Hook Form — Efficient form handling with validation

Key Features

Dashboard Analytics

At-a-glance metrics for enrollment, attendance, resource utilization, and key performance indicators. Customizable widgets for different roles.

Advanced Calendar

Full-featured calendar with recurring events, exception handling, and integration with external calendar systems.

Form Builder

Create custom forms for applications, surveys, evaluations, and data collection without developer involvement.

Report Generation

Standard and custom reports for accreditation, compliance, and internal management needs.

Role-Based Access

Administrators, faculty, staff, students, and parents each see exactly what they need — nothing more, nothing less.

Who Is Edu-ERP For?

  • K-12 schools — Manage the full complexity of primary and secondary education
  • Training centers — Corporate training, professional development, certification programs
  • Language schools — Course scheduling, student progress, teacher assignments
  • Higher education — Departments, programs, and administrative units
  • Tutoring services — Match students with tutors, track sessions, manage billing

Implementation Approach

We understand that switching systems is disruptive. Edu-ERP is designed for smooth adoption:

  • Data migration — Import existing student, staff, and course data
  • Gradual rollout — Start with one module, expand as comfortable
  • Training included — Comprehensive training for administrators and users
  • Ongoing support — Help when you need it

Development Status

Edu-ERP is in active development with core functionality available:

  • Calendar and scheduling system complete
  • Dashboard analytics implemented
  • Form handling and validation ready
  • Expanding module coverage

Get Started

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Request a demo of Edu-ERP

Edu-ERP — Educational resource planning that understands education.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: GreenTrack — On-Device Machine Learning for Privacy-First Applications
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Privacy Problem with Cloud AI

Every time you use a cloud-based AI service:

  • Your data travels — Sensitive information crosses networks to remote servers
  • Someone else processes it — Third parties see, store, and potentially use your data
  • You lose control — Once data leaves your device, you can't unsend it
  • Connectivity required — No internet means no AI features
  • Latency added — Round trips to servers slow down interactions

For many applications — personal documents, health data, financial information, private communications — this tradeoff isn't acceptable.

GreenTrack: ML That Stays Local

GreenTrack uses Transformers.js to run machine learning models directly in the browser. Your data never leaves your device.

How It Works

  • Models download once — Pre-trained models cached locally
  • Inference runs locally — All processing happens on your device
  • No server calls — Zero data transmitted for AI features
  • Works offline — Full functionality without internet

Capabilities

Modern browser-based ML can handle sophisticated tasks:

  • Text classification — Categorize documents, detect sentiment, identify topics
  • Named entity recognition — Extract people, places, organizations from text
  • Text generation — Autocomplete, suggestions, summarization
  • Embeddings — Semantic search, similarity matching
  • Translation — Language conversion without cloud APIs

Technical Architecture

GreenTrack is built for performance and reliability:

  • React 19 + Vite — Modern, fast frontend framework
  • Transformers.js — Hugging Face's browser-optimized ML library
  • WebAssembly — Near-native performance for computation
  • Web Workers — ML processing doesn't block the UI
  • IndexedDB — Efficient local model storage
  • TypeScript — Type safety throughout

Performance Considerations

Running ML in the browser involves tradeoffs:

What Works Well

  • Small to medium models (up to ~500M parameters)
  • Text processing tasks
  • Classification and extraction
  • Batch processing where latency is flexible

Limitations

  • Very large models require significant memory
  • Initial model download can be large
  • Performance varies by device capability
  • Some tasks still benefit from cloud compute

Use Cases

Private Document Analysis

Analyze contracts, medical records, or financial documents without uploading to third-party services.

Offline-First Applications

Build apps that work anywhere — no internet required for AI features.

Edge Computing

Process data at the source without round trips to central servers.

Privacy-Regulated Industries

Healthcare, legal, and financial applications where data sovereignty matters.

Developer Integration

GreenTrack demonstrates patterns other developers can adopt:

// Load model once, use everywhere
const classifier = await pipeline(
  'sentiment-analysis',
  'Xenova/distilbert-base-uncased-finetuned-sst-2-english'
);

// Inference runs entirely in browser
const result = await classifier('This product is amazing!');
// { label: 'POSITIVE', score: 0.9998 }
// No network request made

The Broader Vision

GreenTrack is part of a larger shift in how we think about AI:

  • Privacy by architecture — Not just policy, but technical impossibility of data leakage
  • User empowerment — You control your data and your AI
  • Democratized AI — Advanced capabilities without expensive cloud subscriptions
  • Sustainable computing — Reduce energy consumption of centralized data centers

Current Status

GreenTrack is a technology demonstration showing what's possible with browser-based ML:

  • Core Transformers.js integration complete
  • Multiple model types tested and optimized
  • Performance benchmarking across devices
  • Pattern library for developers

Learn More

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Contact us about edge AI solutions

GreenTrack — Machine learning that respects your privacy.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: Sound Voyage — An Audio-Reactive Space Adventure in Your Browser
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Experience

Sound Voyage is a synesthetic journey where audio and visuals merge:

  • Play any music — Upload your own tracks or use built-in audio
  • Pilot your ship — Navigate through a procedurally generated starfield
  • Fight the beat — Enemies spawn and attack in sync with the music
  • Feel the bass — Visual effects pulse and bloom with audio intensity
  • Chase high scores — Your performance is scored based on survival and accuracy

Technical Innovation

Sound Voyage showcases what's possible in modern browsers:

Real-Time Audio Analysis

  • Web Audio API — Direct access to audio streams for analysis
  • FFT Processing — Real-time frequency decomposition
  • Beat Detection — Custom algorithms identify rhythmic events
  • Frequency Band Mapping — Different frequency ranges drive different game elements

Advanced 3D Graphics

  • Three.js + React Three Fiber — Declarative 3D scene composition
  • Custom GLSL Shaders — Hand-written vertex and fragment shaders for particle systems
  • Post-Processing — Bloom, vignette, chromatic aberration for that neon aesthetic
  • 60fps Performance — Object pooling and GPU optimization for smooth gameplay

Architecture

  • Singleton Pattern — AudioEngine and GameState as single sources of truth
  • React 19 + Vite — Modern build pipeline with hot module replacement
  • TypeScript — Type safety for complex game logic
  • Entity Component System — Efficient game object management

How Audio Drives Gameplay

Enemy Spawning

Beat detection triggers enemy waves. Fast-paced music means more enemies. The game literally plays to your music.

Visual Effects

Low frequencies drive bloom intensity. High frequencies sparkle the starfield. Mid-range shapes particle trails.

Ship Response

Your ship's glow, trail length, and shield effects respond to audio energy. You become part of the visualization.

Difficulty Scaling

Intense music sections increase difficulty. Quiet passages offer brief respite. The game pacing matches the music pacing.

Visual Style

Sound Voyage features a distinctive neon aesthetic:

  • Synthwave palette — Deep purples, electric blues, hot pinks
  • Glowing edges — Everything has that retro-future glow
  • Particle systems — Thousands of particles create immersive space environment
  • Dynamic lighting — Lights respond to audio in real-time

Play Anywhere

Sound Voyage runs entirely in your browser:

  • No download required — Just visit the URL and play
  • Cross-platform — Works on any modern browser
  • Keyboard or gamepad — Multiple control options
  • Mobile support — Touch controls for phones and tablets

For Developers

Sound Voyage demonstrates several advanced web development techniques:

  • Real-time audio processing in JavaScript
  • Custom shader programming in GLSL
  • Performance optimization for complex 3D scenes
  • Game state management in React
  • Object pooling for particle systems

The Technology Behind the Magic

// Beat detection drives enemy spawning
audioEngine.onBeat((intensity) => {
  if (intensity > threshold) {
    spawnEnemyWave(intensity);
  }
});

// Frequency bands control visual effects
const [bass, mid, treble] = analyzeFrequencies(fftData);
bloomPass.strength = mapRange(bass, 0, 255, 0.5, 2.0);
starfield.sparkle = mapRange(treble, 0, 255, 0, 1);

Current Status

Sound Voyage is playable now and continuously being improved:

  • Core gameplay loop complete
  • Audio analysis working across music genres
  • Multiple enemy types and patterns
  • Polishing visual effects and game feel

Experience Sound Voyage

  • Visit TECXMATE
  • Contact us for demo access

Sound Voyage — Where music becomes gameplay.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: Statics Lab — Interactive Physics Education That Makes Engineering Click
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Learning Challenge

Statics is notoriously difficult to learn from books:

  • Abstract concepts — Forces, moments, and equilibrium are invisible
  • 2D limitations — Textbook diagrams can't show dynamic behavior
  • Trial and error missing — You can't experiment with a printed page
  • Math disconnect — Equations don't intuitively connect to physical reality

Students memorize formulas without understanding. They pass exams but struggle with real engineering problems.

Statics Lab: Learning by Doing

Statics Lab provides an interactive sandbox for exploring mechanics:

Build Systems

  • Drag-and-drop construction — Create beams, supports, and connections
  • Apply forces — Add point loads, distributed loads, moments
  • Define constraints — Pins, rollers, fixed supports
  • Connect members — Build trusses, frames, and machines

See Forces

  • Real-time visualization — Watch force vectors change as you modify the system
  • Reaction forces — See how supports respond to loading
  • Internal forces — Visualize shear, moment, and axial force diagrams
  • Equilibrium indicators — Know instantly if your system is balanced

Understand Math

  • Live equations — KaTeX rendering shows the math behind the physics
  • Step-by-step solutions — See how equilibrium equations are derived
  • Variable exploration — Change values and watch equations update
  • Unit handling — Proper engineering units throughout

Technical Foundation

Statics Lab combines multiple technologies for an optimal learning experience:

  • React 19 + Vite — Fast, responsive interface
  • Konva — High-performance 2D canvas for interactive diagrams
  • Matter.js — Physics engine for realistic simulation
  • KaTeX — Beautiful mathematical notation
  • Zustand — Clean state management for complex interactions
  • TypeScript — Type safety for reliable engineering calculations

Learning Modules

Fundamentals

  • Force vectors and components
  • Moments and couples
  • Equilibrium conditions
  • Free body diagrams

Structures

  • Simply supported beams
  • Cantilever beams
  • Continuous beams
  • Statically determinate trusses

Analysis

  • Method of joints
  • Method of sections
  • Shear and moment diagrams
  • Influence lines

Applications

  • Bridge loading scenarios
  • Building frame analysis
  • Machine component forces
  • Real-world case studies

Who Is Statics Lab For?

  • Engineering students — Supplement your coursework with hands-on exploration
  • Professors — Demonstrate concepts in lectures with live manipulation
  • Self-learners — Understand mechanics without formal engineering background
  • Professionals — Quick verification tool for conceptual design

Pedagogical Approach

Statics Lab is designed around proven learning principles:

  • Active learning — Doing is more effective than watching
  • Immediate feedback — See results instantly, not after grading
  • Multiple representations — Visual, mathematical, and physical views together
  • Scaffolded complexity — Start simple, build to advanced topics

Interactive Features

Click and Drag Everything

Move forces, adjust supports, resize members — the system responds in real-time.

Guided Exercises

Step-by-step problems that teach concepts progressively.

Sandbox Mode

Open-ended exploration for testing your own ideas.

Solution Checking

Verify your manual calculations against the simulation.

Example: Understanding a Simply Supported Beam

Traditional learning:

  1. Read about reaction forces in a textbook
  2. Memorize the formulas
  3. Solve homework problems
  4. Hope you understood

With Statics Lab:

  1. Place a beam with supports
  2. Add a load and watch reactions appear
  3. Move the load and see reactions change
  4. See the moment diagram update in real-time
  5. Understand intuitively why the formulas work

Development Status

Statics Lab is in active development:

  • Core interaction engine complete
  • Basic structures and loading scenarios available
  • Mathematical rendering integrated
  • Expanding curriculum content

Try Statics Lab

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Request access to Statics Lab

Statics Lab — See the forces. Understand the physics.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: TecxNote — Contact Intelligence That Captures Every Conversation
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Trade Show Problem

Trade shows are lead generation machines — and lead losing machines. The math is brutal:

  • 20-30 conversations per day — Each lasting 3-15 minutes
  • 70-85 dB ambient noise — Making notes difficult to hear yourself think
  • No reliable WiFi — Exhibition halls are connectivity dead zones
  • End-of-day exhaustion — When you finally sit down to process leads, you're running on fumes

The traditional workflow fails at every step:

  1. Talk to prospect
  2. Exchange business cards
  3. Scribble illegible notes on the back (maybe)
  4. Repeat 25 times
  5. Return to hotel, try to reconstruct conversations from memory
  6. Enter contacts into CRM days later — with most context lost

By the time leads reach your CRM, the information that makes them valuable — what they care about, what you discussed, what you promised — has evaporated.

How TecxNote Works

TecxNote is designed around one principle: capture everything now, process it later.

The Core Loop

  1. Record — One tap starts recording. Phone stays in your pocket or hand. Works completely offline.
  2. Scan — Conversation ends, scan their business card. OCR extracts name, company, title, email, phone automatically.
  3. AI Processes — TecxNote transcribes with speaker diarization, generates summaries, extracts action items — all attributed to each speaker.
  4. Contact Created — Business card data and conversation intelligence merge into a single, rich contact record.

Total time between conversations: less than 15 seconds. Stop, scan, confirm, start next recording. Processing happens in the background — it never blocks you.

Built for Reality

Every design decision addresses the physical reality of exhibition floors:

  • Noisy Environments — Batch processing with Deepgram Nova-3 handles background noise far better than real-time streaming
  • Offline Operation — Full recording and card scanning without internet; automatic upload when you're back online
  • One-Handed Use — Large tap targets, minimal gestures, designed for standing and walking
  • High Volume — Handles 30+ recordings per day with background processing queues
  • Smart Deduplication — Recognizes when you've scanned the same card twice

AI That Delivers Value

TecxNote uses a hybrid AI architecture:

Free Tier

  • On-device transcription using whisper.rn
  • Apple Foundation Models or Gemini Nano for summarization
  • 5 recordings per month at zero cost

Paid Tier

  • Deepgram Nova-3 for accurate transcription with speaker labels
  • Claude Sonnet for rich, speaker-attributed summaries
  • Action item extraction with follow-up reminders
  • Unlimited recordings

The quality difference between tiers is the natural upgrade trigger — free gets the job done, paid makes it effortless.

What You Get

For every conversation, TecxNote creates a contact record containing:

  • Contact Information — Name, company, title, email, phone extracted from business card
  • Full Transcript — Complete conversation with speaker labels
  • AI Summary — Key points distilled into a scannable overview
  • Action Items — What you promised, what they requested, extracted automatically
  • Discussion Topics — Tagged themes for easy filtering and search
  • Recording — Original audio for reference when you need exact words

End-of-Day Review

When you finally sit down after a long day, TecxNote's daily digest view lets you:

  • Review every conversation at a glance
  • Star high-priority leads
  • Assign contacts to team members
  • Export to CRM (HubSpot, Salesforce integrations coming)
  • Generate follow-up email drafts

Who Is TecxNote For?

Sales Team Managers

You manage 4-6 reps at events, take 15-20 meetings yourself, and need to debrief the team and consolidate leads the same evening. TecxNote gives you a complete picture without relying on anyone's memory.

Sales Representatives

You work the booth or walk the floor, having 20-30 brief conversations daily. TecxNote captures everything so you can focus on the conversation, not on note-taking.

Business Development

Every networking event is an opportunity. TecxNote ensures no connection is wasted.

Development Roadmap

  • Phase 1 (MVP) — Core recording, transcription, AI summaries, offline support
  • Phase 2 — Business card scanning, contact intelligence, speaker-to-contact linking
  • Phase 3 — Cloud sync, PDF/CSV export, file import
  • Phase 4 — Team workspaces, CRM integration, full-text search, multi-language

We're currently in active development, building toward our MVP validation: can a sales rep record 10 conversations at a trade show and get usable transcripts and summaries for all of them?

Get Early Access

TecxNote is launching soon. Join the early access list:

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Request early access to TecxNote

TecxNote — Record conversations. Capture contacts. Never lose a lead.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: TecxTasks — Modern Task Management That Actually Gets Used
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Problem with Task Management

We've all been there. You start with a new task management tool, full of optimism. A week later:

  • Half the team isn't using it
  • Tasks are scattered across the tool, email, Slack, and sticky notes
  • The overhead of managing tasks takes longer than doing them
  • Nobody trusts the tool as the source of truth

The problem isn't discipline — it's design. Most task tools are built for demos, not daily use.

TecxTasks: Designed for Daily Use

TecxTasks is built on three principles:

1. Speed Is Everything

If adding a task takes more than 2 seconds, you won't do it. TecxTasks is optimized for speed:

  • Instant capture — Keyboard shortcuts to add tasks without leaving your current context
  • Quick entry — Natural language parsing: "Call John tomorrow at 2pm" just works
  • Fast navigation — Keyboard-driven interface for power users
  • Real-time sync — Changes appear instantly across all devices

2. Flexibility Without Chaos

Different tasks need different views. TecxTasks adapts to your workflow:

  • List view — Classic to-do list for simple task management
  • Board view — Kanban-style for visual workflow tracking
  • Calendar view — See tasks alongside your schedule
  • Focus mode — Hide everything except what you're working on right now

3. Just Enough Structure

TecxTasks provides organization without bureaucracy:

  • Projects — Group related tasks
  • Tags — Cross-cutting categorization
  • Due dates — With smart reminders
  • Priorities — Simple high/medium/low
  • No required fields — Add as much or as little detail as you need

Technical Foundation

TecxTasks is built on modern, reliable infrastructure:

  • Next.js 16 — Fast, SEO-friendly, great developer experience
  • React 19 — Latest React with concurrent features
  • Supabase — Real-time database with built-in auth
  • Tailwind CSS — Clean, consistent design system
  • date-fns — Reliable date handling

This stack means:

  • Real-time collaboration without refresh
  • Works on any device with a browser
  • Data security you can trust
  • Fast performance even with thousands of tasks

Key Features

Smart Due Dates

Set dates naturally ("next Monday", "in 3 days") and get reminders that actually help — not a wall of notifications, but timely nudges for what matters.

Quick Filters

One-click filters for common views: Today, This Week, Overdue, Unscheduled. Custom saved filters for your specific workflows.

Recurring Tasks

Set it and forget it. Daily standup notes, weekly reviews, monthly reports — they appear when you need them.

Subtasks

Break down complex tasks without creating project management overhead. Simple nesting that works.

Notes and Context

Attach notes, links, and context to tasks. When you come back to a task weeks later, you'll remember why it matters.

Who Is TecxTasks For?

  • Individual professionals — Manage your personal workload without overhead
  • Small teams — Collaborate without the complexity of enterprise tools
  • Freelancers — Track client work and personal projects in one place
  • Students — Manage assignments, projects, and deadlines

What's Coming

  • Team workspaces — Shared projects with role-based access
  • Integrations — Connect with the tools you already use
  • Mobile apps — Native iOS and Android experiences
  • API access — Build custom workflows

Get Started

TecxTasks is currently in development. Join our early access program:

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Request early access

TecxTasks — Task management that gets out of your way.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: Vietnamy — The First Dedicated Vietnamese Learning App
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
The Problem

If you've tried learning Vietnamese with existing apps, you know the frustration:

  • Tone training is an afterthought — Vietnamese has 6 tones that completely change word meaning, yet most apps barely address them
  • Grammar explanations are shallow — Vietnamese grammar differs fundamentally from English; generic approaches don't work
  • No cultural context — Language and culture are inseparable; learning words without context is learning half the language
  • Limited vocabulary — Most apps offer a few hundred words, barely enough for basic tourism
  • No progression path — Random lessons without a structured curriculum from beginner to advanced

We built Vietnamy because Vietnamese learners deserve better.

What Makes Vietnamy Different

Built From the Ground Up for Vietnamese

Vietnamy isn't a generic language app with Vietnamese content bolted on. Every feature is designed specifically for the challenges of learning Vietnamese:

  • Tone Training System — Practice all 6 Vietnamese tones with visual feedback and audio comparison
  • IPA Transcription — Every word includes International Phonetic Alphabet notation for precise pronunciation
  • Northern/Southern Variants — Learn both major dialect variations where they differ
  • Character-by-Character Breakdown — Understand how Vietnamese words are constructed

Scientifically-Backed Learning

We don't guess at pedagogy. Vietnamy implements proven learning science:

  • Spaced Repetition (SM-2) — The same algorithm used by medical students to memorize thousands of facts, optimized for Vietnamese vocabulary
  • Active Recall — Testing yourself is more effective than passive review; our drills are designed around this principle
  • Contextual Learning — Words are taught in sentences, sentences in conversations, conversations in cultural context
  • Progressive Difficulty — Structured curriculum that builds on previous knowledge

Gamification That Works

Learning should be engaging, not boring. Vietnamy keeps you motivated with:

  • Daily Streaks — Build the habit of daily practice
  • Coins and Hearts — Earn rewards for correct answers, lose hearts for mistakes
  • Level Progression — Clear milestones from absolute beginner to conversational fluency
  • Achievement System — Unlock badges for consistency and mastery

Comprehensive Dictionary

More than just definitions, our smart dictionary provides:

  • IPA transcription for every entry
  • Example sentences showing real usage
  • Related words and phrases
  • Audio pronunciation by native speakers
  • Fuzzy search that handles typos and partial matches

Bilingual Support

Vietnamy supports learners from different backgrounds:

  • English speakers — Full English interface and explanations
  • Chinese speakers — Complete Chinese localization, leveraging Sino-Vietnamese vocabulary connections

Who Is Vietnamy For?

  • Expats in Vietnam — Living in Ho Chi Minh City or Hanoi and want to connect with locals
  • Vietnamese diaspora — Reconnecting with heritage language and culture
  • Business professionals — Working with Vietnamese partners or clients
  • Travelers — Planning an extended trip and want more than tourist phrases
  • Language enthusiasts — Adding Vietnamese to your linguistic repertoire

Technical Excellence

Behind the friendly interface, Vietnamy is built on solid technology:

  • React 19 + Vite — Fast, responsive interface
  • Express.js Backend — Reliable API with SQLite database
  • Offline Support — Download lessons and practice without internet
  • Admin CMS — Constantly updated content managed by language experts
  • Cross-Platform — Works on web, iOS, and Android

What's in the App

  • Structured Lessons — From alphabet and tones through conversational fluency
  • Grammar Drills — Targeted practice for Vietnamese-specific structures
  • Vocabulary Builder — Thousands of words organized by topic and frequency
  • Cultural Lessons — Understanding Vietnam beyond the language
  • Review System — Spaced repetition keeps everything fresh
  • Progress Tracking — See how far you've come

Current Status

Vietnamy is in active development with a working prototype available to try. We're continuously expanding our content library based on user feedback and adding new features every month.

Get Started

Ready to learn Vietnamese the right way?

  • Try Vietnamy now — it's free to start
  • Join our waitlist for new features
  • Join the Vietnamy community on Facebook

Vietnamy — Learn Vietnamese, understand Vietnam.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: About TECXMATE — Building Software That Solves Real Problems
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Our Mission

We exist to bridge gaps — between languages, between data and insight, between complexity and clarity. Our mission is to create software that empowers individuals and businesses to work smarter, learn faster, and achieve more.

Our Values

1. User-Centric Design

Every feature we build starts with a question: does this make our users' lives better? We don't add complexity for its own sake. We don't chase trends. We observe real workflows, identify real pain points, and design solutions that fit naturally into how people actually work.

This means:

  • One-handed operation for mobile apps used in the field
  • Offline-first architecture for unreliable environments
  • Minimal clicks to accomplish common tasks
  • Clear, intuitive interfaces that require no training

2. Technical Excellence

We believe that great user experiences are built on solid foundations. Our engineering standards reflect this belief:

  • Modern Architecture — React 19, Next.js, TypeScript across the stack
  • Type Safety — Fewer bugs, better developer experience, faster iteration
  • Performance First — 60fps animations, fast load times, efficient resource usage
  • Scalable Design — Monorepo structures, shared components, clean separation of concerns

We don't cut corners on code quality, because technical debt always becomes user experience debt.

3. Practical Innovation

Innovation at TECXMATE means finding better ways to solve existing problems, not inventing problems to match our solutions. We integrate AI where it delivers real value — transcription that works in noisy trade show environments, spaced repetition algorithms that optimize learning retention, on-device ML that preserves privacy.

We're not impressed by technology for its own sake. We're impressed by technology that disappears into the background while making users more effective.

4. Domain Expertise

We don't build generic tools. Each product reflects deep understanding of its domain:

  • Vietnamy — Built by people who understand Vietnamese linguistics, tonal systems, and the specific challenges English and Chinese speakers face learning Vietnamese
  • TecxNote — Designed around the physical reality of trade show floors: noisy environments, rapid conversations, unreliable WiFi, end-of-day exhaustion
  • Dental AI — Informed by the workflows and documentation requirements of dental practice management

5. Accessibility and Inclusion

Software should work for everyone. We build with accessibility in mind from day one:

  • Radix UI components for WCAG compliance
  • Keyboard navigation throughout
  • Screen reader compatibility
  • Multilingual support — not as an afterthought, but as a core feature

6. Transparency and Trust

We believe in honest communication with our users and partners. Our pricing is clear. Our roadmaps are public. When something doesn't work, we acknowledge it and fix it. When we don't know something, we say so and find out.

What We Build

Our product portfolio spans several focus areas, each addressing underserved markets with purpose-built solutions:

Education & Language Learning

  • Vietnamy — The first dedicated Vietnamese learning app
  • Edu-ERP — Educational resource planning for institutions
  • Statics Lab — Interactive physics and engineering education

Business Productivity

  • TecxNote — Contact intelligence for sales teams
  • TecxTasks — Cloud-based task management
  • TecxMate Dashboard — Enterprise SaaS platform

AI & Specialized Solutions

  • Dental AI — Practice management intelligence
  • GreenTrack — On-device machine learning
  • Sound Voyage — Audio-reactive interactive experiences

Our Commitment to Clients

When you work with TECXMATE — whether as a user, a partner, or a client — you can expect:

  • Products that work — Tested, reliable software that does what it promises
  • Responsive support — Real humans who understand the product and care about your success
  • Continuous improvement — Regular updates driven by user feedback
  • Fair pricing — Value-based pricing with free tiers where possible
  • Data respect — Your data is yours; we don't sell it, mine it, or misuse it

Join Us

We're building a portfolio of products that matter. If you share our values and want to be part of what we're creating:

  • Explore our products
  • Partner with us
  • Try Vietnamy

TECXMATE — Software that solves real problems.

TECXMATE — Building the future, one product at a time.

item.title: Inside the TECXMATE Lab — 29 Projects Shaping the Future of EdTech, AI, and Business Software
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
Our Technology Philosophy

Every project at TECXMATE shares a common DNA: modern React architecture, TypeScript for safety, and user-centric design. We've standardized on a stack that balances cutting-edge capabilities with production reliability:

  • Frontend — React 19, Next.js 15/16, Vite, Tailwind CSS, Radix UI
  • Backend — Express.js, NestJS, Supabase, Firebase
  • AI Integration — OpenAI, Claude API, Transformers.js, Deepgram
  • Graphics — Three.js, React Three Fiber, Konva, custom GLSL shaders
  • Deployment — Vercel, with offline-first architecture where it matters

Language Learning & Education

Education is at the heart of what we do. Our flagship products in this space are designed to make learning accessible, engaging, and effective.

Vietnamy — Vietnamese Language Learning Platform

Vietnamy is our answer to a simple question: why is there no dedicated app for learning Vietnamese? Built with React 19 and a custom Express.js backend, Vietnamy delivers:

  • Interactive lessons with gamification (coins, hearts, streaks)
  • Spaced repetition (SM-2 algorithm) for vocabulary retention
  • Comprehensive dictionary with IPA transcription
  • Grammar drills and pronunciation training for all 6 Vietnamese tones
  • Bilingual UI supporting English and Chinese learners
  • Full admin CMS for content management

The architecture is designed for adaptation — the same codebase can be extended to other language pairs with minimal modification.

Learny — Full-Stack Educational Monorepo

Learny demonstrates our approach to scalable education platforms. Built as a monorepo with Next.js frontend and NestJS backend, it features Prisma ORM for type-safe database access and a clean separation of concerns between web application and API.

Edu-ERP — Educational Resource Planning

For institutions managing complex educational operations, Edu-ERP provides calendar integration, form validation, analytics dashboards with Recharts, and smooth animations via Framer Motion — all built on Next.js 16 with React 19.

Interactive 3D & Creative Technology

We push the boundaries of what's possible in the browser. Our 3D projects showcase advanced graphics programming and real-time audio-visual experiences.

Sound Voyage — Audio-Reactive Space Shooter

Sound Voyage (sdn-viz) is our most technically ambitious project: a fully audio-reactive 3D space shooter game. Features include:

  • Real-time FFT audio analysis and beat detection via Web Audio API
  • Custom GLSL vertex and fragment shaders for particle systems
  • Three.js rendering with React Three Fiber integration
  • Post-processing effects: Bloom, Vignette, and chromatic aberration
  • Object pooling for 60fps performance with thousands of particles
  • Singleton architecture for AudioEngine and GameState management

The neon spaceship responds to music in real-time — enemies spawn on beats, visual effects pulse with bass, and the starfield reacts to audio intensity.

Statics Lab — Interactive Physics Visualization

Statics Lab brings engineering concepts to life. Using Matter.js for physics simulation, Konva for 2D canvas rendering, and KaTeX for mathematical notation, it provides an interactive environment for learning statics and mechanics.

Business Platforms & SaaS

Our business-focused applications handle real-world complexity with elegant interfaces.

TecxMate Dashboard — Enterprise SaaS Platform

The TecxMate Dashboard is our most comprehensive application, featuring 70+ integrated packages including:

  • Firebase authentication and real-time data
  • QR code generation for inventory and tracking
  • PDF document generation with jspdf and html2canvas
  • Full theming system with light/dark mode
  • Markdown rendering for documentation
  • Advanced form handling and validation

TecxTasks — Cloud-Based Task Management

Built on Next.js 16 with Supabase integration, TecxTasks provides modern task management with real-time sync, intuitive date handling with date-fns, and a clean Tailwind CSS interface.

TecxNote — Contact Intelligence Platform

TecxNote transforms how sales teams capture leads at trade shows. Record conversations, scan business cards, and let AI combine everything into rich contact records with full context. Currently in active development with extensive product documentation and unit economics modeling.

AI & Data Intelligence

AI isn't a buzzword for us — it's a tool we integrate thoughtfully where it delivers real value.

Dental AI — Practice Management Intelligence

Dental AI brings artificial intelligence to dental practice management. With a React frontend and Express.js backend integrated with OpenAI's API, it streamlines documentation and analysis workflows for dental professionals.

GreenTrack — On-Device ML Inference

GreenTrack demonstrates our capability with edge AI. Using Transformers.js, it runs machine learning models directly in the browser — no server required. This opens possibilities for privacy-preserving AI features that work offline.

Fin-Claude — Financial Intelligence

Our Python-based Fin-Claude project integrates Claude API for financial analysis, built with Model Context Protocol (MCP) for structured AI interactions.

Data & Research Infrastructure

Great products are built on great data. Our infrastructure projects support content creation and knowledge management.

Crawler — Vietnamese Grammar Data Collection

A sophisticated Python-based web scraping toolkit that powers our language learning content. It generates 400KB+ of structured grammar data in JSON format, compiled markdown resources, and maintains an Obsidian-compatible knowledge base.

Enen — Flashcard Database

Enen contains 2MB+ of structured flashcard data supporting scenario-based learning across our educational platforms.

Corporate & Legal

TecxCorp — Document Generation

Our TecxCorp repository handles corporate legal documentation with Python-based document generation, Vietnamese enterprise law compliance, and SAFE framework templates for fundraising.

Our Development Approach

Across all 29 projects, several patterns emerge that define how we build software:

  • Offline-First Architecture — Critical applications work without internet, syncing when connectivity returns
  • Mobile-First Design — Responsive interfaces optimized for touch, designed for one-handed operation
  • Monorepo Structure — Shared code, consistent tooling, and unified dependency management
  • TypeScript Everywhere — Type safety from database to UI for fewer bugs and better developer experience
  • Component Libraries — Radix UI for accessibility, shadcn/ui for rapid development
  • Gamification — Points, streaks, and rewards where they enhance engagement

What's Next

We're actively developing several flagship products toward public release:

  • Vietnamy — Expanding content library and refining the learning algorithm
  • TecxNote — Building toward MVP validation at real trade shows
  • Sound Voyage — Polishing for public release as a showcase of browser-based gaming
  • Statics Lab — Expanding curriculum coverage for engineering students

Get Involved

We're always looking for collaborators, early adopters, and feedback:

  • Visit TECXMATE
  • Try Vietnamy
  • Get in touch with our team

29 projects. One mission: building software that makes a difference.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: About TecxNote — Contact Intelligence Powered by Voice
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What is TecxNote?

TecxNote is a mobile app designed specifically for sales teams at trade shows, exhibitions, and networking events. The concept is simple: you record a conversation, scan a business card, and TecxNote does the rest — combining voice and card data into a single, enriched contact record with full context on who the person is, what they need, and what you promised.

No typing. No forgotten details. No more lost leads.

The Problem We're Solving

Trade shows are a black hole for leads. A typical sales rep has 20 to 30 rapid-fire conversations per day, each lasting just 3 to 15 minutes. The current workflow looks something like this:

  1. Talk to prospect
  2. Exchange business cards
  3. Scribble notes on the back of the card (or don't)
  4. Repeat 25 more times
  5. Return to hotel room, try to remember who said what
  6. Manually enter contacts into CRM days later — if at all

By the time leads make it into the CRM, the context that makes them valuable — what the prospect actually cares about, what you discussed, what follow-up they expect — is gone. TecxNote closes that gap.

How It Works

TecxNote's core loop is designed for speed and simplicity, built around the reality of a noisy trade show floor:

  • Record — Tap one button to start recording your conversation. The phone stays in your pocket or hand. Works fully offline.
  • Scan — When the conversation ends, scan their business card. The camera opens instantly with a framing guide. OCR extracts name, company, title, email, and phone automatically.
  • AI Processes — TecxNote transcribes the recording with speaker diarization, generates a conversation summary, extracts action items, and identifies key discussion points — all attributed to each speaker.
  • Contact Created — The business card data and conversation intelligence merge into a single, rich contact card. You now have a complete record: who they are, what you talked about, and what to do next.

The entire cycle between conversations takes less than 15 seconds. Stop, scan, confirm, start the next recording. Processing happens in the background — it never blocks you.

Built for the Trade Show Floor

Every design decision in TecxNote is shaped by the physical reality of exhibitions:

  • Noisy environments (70-85 dB) — We use batch speech-to-text processing with Deepgram Nova-3, which handles background noise far better than real-time streaming
  • No reliable WiFi — Full offline recording with automatic upload when you're back on a stable connection
  • One-handed operation — Large tap targets, minimal gestures, designed for standing and walking
  • High volume — Built to handle 30+ recordings per day with background processing queues and smart duplicate detection
  • End-of-day review — A daily digest view lets you review every conversation, assign contacts, star priorities, and export everything before you sleep

Smart AI, Two Tiers

TecxNote uses a hybrid AI architecture that delivers value at every level:

  • Free tier — On-device transcription and summarization using whisper.rn and Apple Foundation Models / Gemini Nano. Five recordings per month at zero cost.
  • Paid tier — Cloud-powered pipeline with Deepgram Nova-3 for accurate transcription with speaker labels, and Claude Sonnet for rich, speaker-attributed summaries and action items.

The quality difference between tiers is the natural upgrade trigger — free gets the job done, paid makes it effortless.

Who Is TecxNote For?

TecxNote is built for two key personas:

  • Sales Team Managers — You manage 4 to 6 reps at events, take 15 to 20 meetings yourself, and need to debrief the team and consolidate leads the same evening. TecxNote gives you a complete picture without relying on anyone's memory.
  • Sales Reps — You work the booth or walk the floor, having 20 to 30 brief conversations daily. TecxNote captures everything so you can focus on the conversation, not on note-taking.

What's Coming

TecxNote is being developed in focused phases:

  • Phase 1 (MVP) — Core recording, transcription, AI summaries, and offline support
  • Phase 2 — Business card scanning, contact intelligence, speaker-to-contact linking, and the quick capture cycle
  • Phase 3 — Cloud sync, PDF and CSV export, and file import
  • Phase 4 — Team workspaces, CRM integration (HubSpot, Salesforce), full-text search, and multi-language support

We are currently in active development, building toward our MVP validation: can a sales rep record 10 conversations at a trade show and get usable transcripts and summaries for all of them?

Get Involved

If you work trade shows and are tired of losing leads, we want to hear from you:

  • Learn more about TECXMATE
  • Get in touch — join our early access list

TecxNote — Record conversations. Capture contacts. Never lose a lead.

Built by TECXMATE

item.title: About Vietnamy — The First Dedicated Vietnamese Learning App
item.dc:creator: admin
item.content:encoded:
What is Vietnamy?

Vietnamy is a Vietnamese language and culture learning app designed for:

  • Expats living and working in Vietnam
  • Vietnamese diaspora communities around the world
  • International travelers exploring Vietnam
  • Professionals and business partners working with the Vietnamese market

More Than Just a Language App

Vietnamy is built to deliver a learning experience that is natural, practical, engaging, and meaningful — helping learners pick up Vietnamese quickly through a personalized approach tailored to their individual needs.

Unlike traditional methods, Vietnamy combines:

  • Interactive Lessons — A structured curriculum from beginner to advanced
  • Pronunciation Training — Practice all 6 Vietnamese tones with instant feedback
  • Smart Dictionary — Fast lookup with IPA transcription, real-world examples, and multilingual support
  • Spaced Repetition (SRS) — A scientifically-backed algorithm that helps you remember more, longer
  • Gamification — Points, streaks, and rewards to keep you motivated
  • Vietnamese Culture — Go beyond grammar and gain a deeper understanding of the people and culture

Why Vietnamy?

Today, there is no app on the market truly purpose-built for learning Vietnamese. Popular language apps like Duolingo or Rosetta Stone offer only surface-level Vietnamese content, lacking depth in grammar, tones, and cultural context.

Vietnamy was created to fill that gap — a product built from the ground up for Vietnamese, by people who understand the language.

Where We Are and What's Next

Vietnamy is currently in research and development (R&D), with a working prototype ready to try. We are continuously improving content and features based on feedback from our growing community of users.

If you are interested in Vietnamy:

  • Try Vietnamy now
  • Join the waitlist and share your ideas
  • Join the Vietnamy community on Facebook

Vietnamy — Learn Vietnamese, understand Vietnam.

Built by TECXMATE
